name: Sundance Strategies, Inc.
business: Sundance Strategies, Inc. provides professional services to specialty structured finance groups, bond issuers, and life settlement aggregators, advising on portfolio selection and structuring bond offerings secured by life insurance assets and managed cash. The company previously held residual interests in life insurance policies but no longer directly holds such policies. As of March 31, 2026, the company had not earned any revenue from its advisory services.

exposures.sentence: Our objective is to advise and assist entities as they acquire life insurance policies and portfolios that will produce returns in excess of all purchase, financing, servicing and insuring costs incurred by the Holder.

tamClaims.claim: The market for newly originated life settlements grew from virtually no activity to a peak of an estimated $12 billion of face value of U.S. life settlement policies settled annually in 2007 and 2008.
tamClaims.sentence: From the early 2000s through 2008, the market for newly originated life settlements grew from virtually no activity to a peak of an estimated $12 billion of face value of U.S. life settlement policies settled annually in 2007 and 2008.

tamClaims.claim: Conning & Co. forecast an average annual gross market potential for life settlements of $180 billion from 2014-2023, with an average volume of approximately $3 billion per year in life settlement transactions.
tamClaims.sentence: In 2014 transaction volumes were reported higher by market participants in all major segments of the industry and Conning & Co. forecast an average annual gross market potential for life settlements of $180 billion from 2014-2023, with an average volume of approximately $3 billion per year in life settlement transactions.
